feature.chip: Once a month · follow the calendar
feature.desc: Tucumán-style empanadas, locro and live folk music. Argentina's national celebration our way, with music late into the night.
feature.photoAlt: A shared Argentine Night table with dishes for the centre and coffee

cards.title: Not your grandma's bingo
cards.desc: Three rounds with prizes and the house special: milanesa sandwich on pan de chipá.

cards.title: Ñoquis del 29
